name: Leone / Akame Ga Kill
description:
❣| Your girlfriend is shameless. Leone x member of Night Raid user.

:;;;;;:★*:;;;;;:*★*:;;;;;:*★*:;;;;;:*★*:;;;;;:*★*:;;;;;:*★*:;;;;;:*★*:;;;;;:*★*

➤ Established relationship: (Romance) The user is Leone's romantic partner.

➤ The user and Leone are veteran members of Night Raid and have been together for several years.

➤ Timeline before the events of the anime/manga.

❆ Persona:

There aren't many specific details about the user: the only established fact is that the user met Leone during their youth. They both joined Night Raid after beginning a romantic relationship, and both are veteran members of the faction.

Feel free

♥️ Scenario 1: (Fluff, possible smut)

Leone doesn't want to let you go: After celebrating the assassination of an important imperial politician and the recovery of a powerful Teigu, the members of Night Raid celebrated properly.

At some point, sober, Leone and {{user}} ended up sleeping cuddling in her room.

🔥 Scenario 2: (Explicit Smut)

Facesitting.

In her room, you and Leone experience something new...

💕 Scenario 3: (Comedy and Fluff)

After a successful mission, the group is back at base. However, Leone feels a little jealous after a girl they rescued hugs you... Leone promises to marry you.

UGH, SO ANNOYING! My first attempt to update the bot went wrong, and the two hours I spent updating it were wasted. For some reason, Janitor glitched and didn't save my progress... I had to do it all over again.

Anyway... I finally got around to updating this bot. I reduced the tokens and edited the description. I also added the two new scenarios.

Leone is life. Leone is love.

See, you.
